description: Active-run per-well anomaly counts and affected-stage totals.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH active_stage AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2 m
  JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_stage_summary_v2 s
    ON s.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
   AND s.name = m.name
   AND s.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
   AND s.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
  WHERE m.status = 'active'
    AND m.algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND m.fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND m.pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR m.name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
)
SELECT
  name AS well_name,
  COUNT(*) AS stages_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total_anomaly_lines > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stages_with_anomaly,
  SUM(total_anomaly_lines) AS total_anomaly_lines,
  SUM(pressure_surge_lines) AS pressure_surge_lines,
  SUM(pump_rate_drop_lines) AS pump_rate_drop_lines,
  SUM(mid_stage_shutdown_lines) AS mid_stage_shutdown_lines,
  SUM(sweep_lines) AS sweep_lines
FROM active_stage
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY total_anomaly_lines DESC, name
) q
